sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After SPACE:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] != 'B':
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Count white dots vs other small colored dots
white_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 1)
sky_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S' and n['pixels'] == 1)
print(f"\nWhite dots: {white_count}")
print(f"Sky blue dots: {sky_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
